ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the media file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the media file (e.g., image, video) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the media file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the media file (e.g., JPEG, PNG, MP4) */,
  "file_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the media file (e.g., 1080p, 4K) */,
  "file_duration" REAL /* Duration of the media file in seconds */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the media file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "restaurant_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the restaurant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the restaurant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the restaurant is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the restaurant is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dishes" (
  "dish_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dish */,
  "dish_name" TEXT /* Name of the dish */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dish */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant where the dish is served */,
  "dish_type" TEXT /* Type of the dish (e.g., appetizer, entree, dessert) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the dish */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calories in the dish */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* Ingredients used in the dish */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file relationship */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file */,
  "related_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related entity (restaurant or dish) */,
  "related_type" TEXT /* Type of the related entity (restaurant or dish) */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order in which the media file should be displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_relations_related_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_relations_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES media_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_relations_related_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_id") REFERENCES dishes ("dish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, marketing staff) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the media file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the media file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES media_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES media_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file associated with the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES media_files ("file_id")
)
